title: NDLEA Visits NIRSAL
description: Chairman/Chief Executive of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. Mohamed Buba Marwa (Retd), OFR with the MD/CEO of Nigeria Incentive-Based Risk Sharing System for Agricultural Lending (NIRSAL), Aliyu Abdulhameed, when h
html: Chairman/Chief Executive of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. Mohamed Buba Marwa (Retd), OFR with the MD/CEO of Nigeria Incentive-Based Risk Sharing System for Agricultural Lending (NIRSAL), Aliyu Abdulhameed, when he led top officials of NDLEA on a courtesy visit to NIRSAL in Maitama, Abuja today Wednesday 6th July 2022.
